headline: 把 GitHub 上分散的 AI 开源信号整理成一份适合每天快速浏览的精选清单。
summary: 系统会优先选择最近仍在活跃推进、定位清晰、不是资源集合类噪音仓库的 AI 开源项目，并提供中文摘要、标签和推荐理由。

projects.name: Rapid-MLX
projects.description: The fastest local AI engine for Apple Silicon. 4.2x faster than Ollama, 0.08s cached TTFT, 100% tool calling. 17 tool parsers, prompt cache, reasoning separation, cloud routing. Drop-in OpenAI replacement. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider.
projects.summaryZh: The fastest local AI engine for Apple Silicon. 4.2x faster than Ollama, 0.08s cached TTFT, 100% tool calling. 17 tool parsers, prompt cache, reasoning separation, cloud routing. Drop-in OpenAI replacement. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider. 它主要面向代码场景，适合做 AI 编程助手、代码生成或自动修复。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: oh-my-pi
projects.description: ⌥  AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more
projects.summaryZh: ⌥  AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。

projects.name: byterover-cli
projects.description: ByteRover CLI (brv) - The portable memory layer for  autonomous coding agents (formerly Cipher)
projects.summaryZh: ByteRover CLI (brv) - The portable memory layer for  autonomous coding agents (formerly Cipher) 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。

projects.name: sglang
projects.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.
projects.summaryZh: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models. 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: mempalace
projects.description: The best-benchmarked open-source AI memory system. And it's free.
projects.summaryZh: The best-benchmarked open-source AI memory system. And it's free. 这是偏模型能力或模型封装的项目，适合作为能力底座持续观察。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合在持续跟踪 AI 开源趋势时作为重点观察对象。

projects.name: mediapipe
projects.description: Cross-platform, customizable ML solutions for live and streaming media.
projects.summaryZh: Cross-platform, customizable ML solutions for live and streaming media. 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做多模态体验、视觉应用和创作工具的团队。

projects.name: vllm-mlx
projects.description: OpenAI and Anthropic compatible server for Apple Silicon. Run LLMs and vision-language models (Llama, Qwen-VL, LLaVA) with continuous batching, MCP tool calling, and multimodal support. Native MLX backend, 400+ tok/s. Works with Claude Code.
projects.summaryZh: OpenAI and Anthropic compatible server for Apple Silicon. Run LLMs and vision-language models (Llama, Qwen-VL, LLaVA) with continuous batching, MCP tool calling, and multimodal support. Native MLX backend, 400+ tok/s. Works with Claude Code. 它主要面向代码场景，适合做 AI 编程助手、代码生成或自动修复。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做 AI Coding、代码审核、开发提效产品的团队。

projects.name: vllm
projects.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs
projects.summaryZh: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
